title: Enable SCIM Provisioning for Enterprise Tenants
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want Microsoft Entra to automatically provision and deprovision users in DataTools Pro, so that employee onboarding and offboarding is handled without manual intervention.
description:
Enterprise tenants need SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provisioning so that their identity provider (Microsoft Entra) can automatically create and disable user accounts.

## Requirements

- SCIM endpoint and token are available per tenant
- Provisioned users appear in the correct Stytch Organization
- Deprovisioning disables access within minutes per the SLA

## Blocker

This is a Microsoft-specific feature that depends on the Microsoft partnership being finalized. Not required for early launch.
acceptance_criteria: SCIM endpoint is available per tenant with a unique provisioning token
Users provisioned via SCIM appear in the correct Stytch Organization
Deprovisioned users have access disabled within minutes
SCIM operations are scoped to the tenant's Organization
middleware_changes: SCIM endpoint handler that processes provisioning and deprovisioning requests from Microsoft Entra, mapping users to the correct Stytch Organization.
data_model_changes: SCIM token storage per tenant. User records need to support SCIM-based creation and deactivation states.
api_changes: New SCIM 2.0 endpoint per tenant for user provisioning lifecycle (create, update, deactivate).
implementation_notes: Blocked on Microsoft partnership. Stytch supports SCIM provisioning per Organization. Implementation will wrap Stytch's SCIM capabilities.
comment_summary: Ryan confirmed this is a Microsoft-specific item that won't be needed for early launch.
